title: Choosing Your Data 360 Provisioning Strategy
author: Kunal Goyal, Erin Wagner Tidwell, Yugandhar Bora

sections.heading: Introduction
sections.text: Enterprises with Data 360 and multiple Salesforce orgs face an important architectural decision: how to bring customer data together in a way that strengthens governance, compliance, and cost efficiency. The choice of how to provision Salesforce Data 360 is a foundational decision that impacts everything from AI readiness to platform features and overall scalability. To help you navigate this complexity, we published a comprehensiveDecision Guide: Data 360 Provisioning. This guide is designed for architects and technical leaders and focuses on three core strategic choices: Choosing Your Home Org:Should you provision Data 360 in an existing major org or create a new, dedicated one?The Multi-Org Strategy:Why isData 360 Onethe recommended default for creating a single source of truth across your orgs?Collaborating Across Separate Data 360s:Strategic guidance on how and when to transition to a Data 360 One cluster versus set up Zero Copy data sharing between Data 360s.

Instead of a one-size-fits-all prescriptive approach, Decision Guides outline: The context of the decisionThe trade-offs of each approachBest practices informed by real-world implementations The goal is to help you make intentional, well-documented choices that align with your architectural strategy—rather than reactive decisions that create downstream complexity and technical debt down the line.

existing_ctas.heading: Discover Decision Guide: Data 360 Provisioning
existing_ctas.body: Learn how to choose your Data 360 provisioning strategy.

raw_html:
Enterprises with Data 360 and multiple Salesforce orgs face an important architectural decision: how to bring customer data together in a way that strengthens governance, compliance, and cost efficiency. 

The choice of how to provision Salesforce Data 360 is a foundational decision that impacts everything from AI readiness to platform features and overall scalability.  To help you navigate this complexity, we published a comprehensive Decision Guide: Data 360 Provisioning. This guide is designed for architects and technical leaders and focuses on three core strategic choices:

  1. Choosing Your Home Org: Should you provision Data 360 in an existing major org or create a new, dedicated one?  
  2. The Multi-Org Strategy: Why is Data 360 One the recommended default for creating a single source of truth across your orgs?  
  3. Collaborating Across Separate Data 360s: Strategic guidance on how and when to transition to a Data 360 One cluster versus set up Zero Copy data sharing between Data 360s.

Why Utilize the Data 360 Provisioning Decision Guide

A Decision Guide is a resource designed to help architects evaluate critical choices with clarity and consistency and choose the right Salesforce tools for your solutions. Instead of a one-size-fits-all prescriptive approach, Decision Guides outline:

  • The context of the decision
  • The trade-offs of each approach
  • Best practices informed by real-world implementations

The goal is to help you make intentional, well-documented choices that align with your architectural strategy—rather than reactive decisions that create downstream complexity and technical debt down the line.

Discover Decision Guide: Data 360 Provisioning

Learn how to choose your Data 360 provisioning strategy.

Learn more
